While there is limited information available on its therapeutic properties, it has been traditionally used by local communities for medicinal purposes. The plant is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may contribute to its potential therapeutic benefits. However, further research is needed to fully understand the plant's therapeutic potential and to confirm its safety for use in medicine. preparations: Wamalchitamia williamsii has been used in traditional herbal preparations, but there is limited information available on its modern use.
